name: publish-codex-skill
description: Validate, package, and safely publish Codex Skills to Wonderful Codex Skills.

interface.shortDescription: Validate and safely publish Codex Skills
interface.longDescription: Review Skill structure and metadata, verify Marketplace packaging, and require explicit confirmation before committing and pushing.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Publish Codex Skill to validate and publish a Skill after explicit confirmation.
